internal_issues.description: tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict both claimed 'no numerical value, no mechanism' — dome specifies 3:1 and offers qualitative mechanism (toroidal return-path through SAA shoulder). TLDRs render before expansion; factual errors here enable defender dismissal of entire panel.
detail_verdict_text made unverifiable absence claim about monitor.py. No monitor.py snapshot in raw-text/ to substantiate. Hedged to 'as of our last full capture'.
detail_evidence (c) implied dome has no definition of hemispheric. Reframed to explicit incommensurability argument: flat-disc central/annular geometry is non-comparable to globe N/S hemispheres.
Cross-WIN quote used 'American cell' but WIN-005 detail_claim says 'Atlantic cell'. Fixed to match.
